name: carl-actionstudio-ghpages
description: GitHub Pages site for CARL Action Studio

scripts.build: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('docs/assets', {recursive: true})" && cpx "../NativeIntegration/assets/**/*" docs/assets --clean && cpx "../node_modules/@babylonjs/havok/lib/esm/*.wasm" docs && cpx "../ImmersiveExperience/assets/**/*" docs/assets && esbuild source/index.js --loader:.js=jsx --bundle --minify --sourcemap --outdir=docs
scripts.start: npm run server & npm run build -- --watch
scripts.deploy: echo 'Deployment is handled by GitHub Actions (deploy-pages.yml)'

author: syntheticmagus
